programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: George is a college professor who recently lost his lover, Jim, in a car accident. Terribly grief-stricken, George plans to commit suicide. As he goes about his daily routine and puts his affairs in order, his encounters with colleagues, students and an old friend lead him to make a final decision whether life is worth living without Jim.

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: When Los Angeles private eye J.J. Jake Gittes (Jack Nicholson) is hired by Evelyn Mulwray to investigate her husband's activities, he believes it's a routine infidelity case. Jake's investigation soon becomes anything but routine when he meets the real Mrs. Mulwray (Faye Dunaway) and realizes he was hired by an imposter. Mr. Mulwray's sudden death sets Gittes on a tangled trail of corruption, deceit and sinister family secrets as Evelyn's father (John Huston) becomes a suspect in the case.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: A comet is hurtling toward Earth and could mean the end of all human life. The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The four nations of Air, Water, Earth and Fire lived in harmony until the Fire Nation declared war. A century later, there is still no end in sight to the destruction, then, an Avatar named Aang (Noah Ringer) discovers that he has the power to control the four elements. He joins forces with Katara (Nicola Peltz), a Waterbender, and her brother, Sokka, to restore balance and harmony to their world.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: In 1839, the slave ship Amistad set sail from Cuba to America. During the long trip, Cinque (Djimon Hounsou) leads the slaves in an unprecedented uprising. They are then held prisoner in Connecticut, and their release becomes the subject of heated debate. Freed slave Theodore Joadson (Morgan Freeman) wants Cinque and the others exonerated and recruits property lawyer Roger Baldwin (Matthew McConaughey) to help his case. Eventually, John Quincy Adams (Anthony Hopkins) also becomes an ally.

programme.title: Heartburn
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat (Meryl Streep), a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman (Jack Nicholson), a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage. They try to build a life together -- literally -- as they struggle with the construction crews renovating their home. When Rachel gets pregnant, Mark is enthusiastic, but then soon begins doubting whether he could be a family man.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Despondent over the marriage of her ex-husband to a younger woman, a middle-aged divorcée plunges to her death from her penthouse. At the woman's funeral, her former college friends (Bette Midler, Goldie Hawn, Diane Keaton) reunite for the first time in nearly 30 years. When the three discover the reason for their friend's suicide, they realize that all of their ex-husbands have taken them for granted -- and deciding it's time for revenge, they make a pact to get back at their exes.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: M'Lynn (Sally Field) is the mother of bride-to-be Shelby Eatenton (Julia Roberts), and as friend Truvy Jones (Dolly Parton) fixes the women's hair for the ceremony, they welcome a helping hand from aspiring beautician Annelle Dupuy DeSoto (Daryl Hannah). Diabetic Shelby has a health scare, which is averted but doesn't bode well for her hopes of having children. Time passes, and the women and their friends encounter tragedy and good fortune, growing stronger and closer in the process.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding
programme.desc: Socially awkward Muriel Heslop (Toni Collette) wants nothing more than to get married. Unfortunately, due to her oppressive politician father (Bill Hunter), Muriel has never even been on a date. Ostracized by her more socially adept friends, Muriel runs into fellow outcast Rhonda Epinstalk (Rachel Griffiths), and the two move from their small Australian town to the big city of Sydney, where Muriel changes her name and begins the arduous task of redesigning her life to match her fantasies.

programme.title: The Woman in Black
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps, a lawyer, is recently widowed and grieving the loss of his wife when he is sent to a remote village to put a deceased eccentric's affairs in order. Soon after his arrival, it becomes clear that the villagers are hiding a terrible secret. Kipps discovers that his late client's house is haunted by the spirit of a woman who is trying to find someone and something she lost, and that no one -- not even the children -- is safe from her terrible wrath.

programme.title: An Inconvenient Truth
programme.desc: Filmmaker Davis Guggenheim follows Al Gore on the lecture circuit, as the former presidential candidate campaigns to raise public awareness of the dangers of global warming and calls for immediate action to curb its destructive effects on the environment.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: While shopping at an outdoor market, young reporter Tintin (Jamie Bell), accompanied by his faithful dog, Snowy, buys a model of an old ship called the Unicorn. A shady character named Sakharine (Daniel Craig) and later an American named Barnaby (Joe Starr) try to buy the model from him, but Tintin refuses. The lad discovers that the ship contains a clue about a hidden treasure, but before he can locate it, Tintin is kidnapped and given over to the custody of drunken Capt. Haddock (Andy Serkis).

programme.title: Reefer Madness
programme.desc: High-school principal Dr. Alfred Carroll (Josef Forte) relates to an audience of parents that marijuana can have devastating effects on teens. In his story, a drug supplier entices several restless teens, including sister and brother Mary (Dorothy Short) and Jimmy Lane (Warren McCollum) and Mary's boyfriend, Bill (Kenneth Craig), into frequenting a reefer house. Gradually, Bill and Jimmy are drawn into smoking dope, which affects their family lives and leads to a terrible crime.

programme.title: Airplane!
programme.desc: This spoof comedy takes shots at the slew of disaster movies that were released in the 70s. When the passengers and crew of a jet are incapacitated due to food poisoning, a rogue pilot with a drinking problem must cooperate with his ex-girlfriend turned stewardess to bring the plane to a safe landing.

programme.title: Airplane!
programme.desc: This spoof comedy takes shots at the slew of disaster movies that were released in the 70s. When the passengers and crew of a jet are incapacitated due to food poisoning, a rogue pilot with a drinking problem must cooperate with his ex-girlfriend turned stewardess to bring the plane to a safe landing.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Struggling new attorney Rudy Baylor (Matt Damon) resorts to working for a shady lawyer (Mickey Rourke), where he meets paralegal Deck Shifflet (Danny DeVito). When the insurance company of Dot Black (Mary Kay Place) refuses her dying son coverage, Baylor and Shifflet team up to fight the corrupt corporation, taking on its callous lawyer (Jon Voight). Meanwhile, Baylor becomes involved with Kelly Riker (Claire Danes), an abused wife, whose husband complicates matters when he confronts Baylor.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: In the midst of the Great Depression, a businessman (Jeff Bridges) coping with the tragic death of his son, a jockey with a history of brutal injuries (Tobey Maguire) and a down-and-out horse trainer (Chris Cooper) team up to help Seabiscuit, a temperamental, undersized racehorse. At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all time, and inspires a nation at a time when it needs it most.

programme.title: Rounders
programme.desc: Mike McDermott loses his money in a poker game against Russian gangster Teddy "KGB". Under pressure from his girlfriend, Jo, he promises to quit gambling. This lasts until his friend, Lester "Worm" Murphy, gets out of prison and needs to pay off an old debt. The pair come close to earning the money back but are caught cheating. Then Mike finds out the debt is owed to Teddy and makes one last-ditch effort to beat the Russian.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: Sara moves from a small Midwestern town to the south side of Chicago when her mother dies in a car accident, and must live with her father. She soon falls for an African American teenager at her new high school, and he has less than an idyllic past. They share a love for dance (ballet and hip hop respectively) and together they tackle the problems that go with an interracial relationship.

programme.title: Soul Men
programme.desc: Louis (Samuel L. Jackson) and Floyd (Bernie Mac) used to be one of the country's top musical duos, until they broke up and never spoke again. Old animosities resurface 20 years later when the two are thrust together on a cross-country trip to take part in a tribute concert honoring their late band leader. Louis and Floyd have just five short days to bury the hatchet -- hopefully not in someone's head -- before they take the stage at New York's Apollo Theater.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: After discovering his girlfriend has been participating in group sex, attorney Mitch feels his world come undone. He moves into a new place, which happens to be near a college campus, and tries to get his life back together. Two of his best friends, Frank and Beanie, start hanging out at Mitch's house, eventually turning the place into a wild party pad, much to the ire of the college's dean, Gordon "Cheese" Pritchard.

programme.title: Top Five
programme.desc: Though he began in stand-up comedy, Andre Allen (Chris Rock) hit the big-time as the star of a trilogy of action-comedies about a talking bear. Andre is forced to spend the day with Chelsea (Rosario Dawson) a profile writer for the New York Times, whose film critic has just panned Andre's passion project about the Haitian Revolution. Unexpectedly, Andre opens up to Chelsea, and as they wind their way across New York, Andre tries to get back in touch with his comedic roots.

programme.title: American Gigolo
programme.desc: Julian, a Beverly Hills escort, commands high prices for his services, living a lavish and emotionally unattached lifestyle under the management of Anne. While secretly working for pimp Leon, Julian is assigned to service Mr. Rheiman and his wife Judy, but leaves when their violent requests make him nervous. When Mrs. Rheiman is found dead and no one is willing to testify on his behalf, Julian finds himself the primary suspect.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century China, a martial-arts student declares war against the rival fighters who murdered his mentor.

programme.title: Rounders
programme.desc: Mike McDermott loses his money in a poker game against Russian gangster Teddy "KGB". Under pressure from his girlfriend, Jo, he promises to quit gambling. This lasts until his friend, Lester "Worm" Murphy, gets out of prison and needs to pay off an old debt. The pair come close to earning the money back but are caught cheating. Then Mike finds out the debt is owed to Teddy and makes one last-ditch effort to beat the Russian.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: Popular and dashing American singer Nick Rivers (Val Kilmer) travels to East Germany to perform in a music festival. When he loses his heart to the gorgeous Hillary Flammond (Lucy Gutteridge), he finds himself caught up in an underground resistance movement. Rivers joins forces with Agent Cedric (Omar Sharif) and Flammond to attempt the rescue of her father, Dr. Paul (Michael Gough), from the Germans, who have captured the scientist in hopes of coercing him into building a new naval mine.

programme.title: Reefer Madness
programme.desc: High-school principal Dr. Alfred Carroll (Josef Forte) relates to an audience of parents that marijuana can have devastating effects on teens. In his story, a drug supplier entices several restless teens, including sister and brother Mary (Dorothy Short) and Jimmy Lane (Warren McCollum) and Mary's boyfriend, Bill (Kenneth Craig), into frequenting a reefer house. Gradually, Bill and Jimmy are drawn into smoking dope, which affects their family lives and leads to a terrible crime.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Fed up with being treated like a servant by her family, Florida accepts a luncheon invitation from a man.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's father and his Army buddies trade war stories during a card game.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: He moved to New York to pursue the American dream, and became successful beyond his wildest imagination; but when a violent attack turns the dream into a nightmare, police must untangle a sinister web of financial crimes and murderous envy.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Whitney Caraway and Amanda Porter are closer than sisters; growing up in a dangerous area, the two relied on each other for stability, security and love; but when a man creates a rift between the friends, betrayal turns deadly.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After a painful divorce, a single mother didn't expect to ever love again; after a charming stranger wins her heart, she becomes desperate to do anything to keep her new man's love.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman finds solace in a new boyfriend after her father passes away; he ropes her into one of his criminal schemes; she finds herself in the midst of a brutal blood bath.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a young mother reunites with her childhood crush, but her new man is guarding a deadly secret that will put her and her son's lives in danger; when she gets caught in the crosshairs, she must choose to save her man or herself.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne fears Freddie may face date rape when she goes out with an aggressive athlete (Taimak).

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Ron claims that Dwayne has Jesse Jackson's endorsement for student government president.

programme.desc: As the semester comes to an end, students make plans for the summer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Patients at the VA Hospital in Clarksburg, W.Va., keep dying after experiencing shockingly low blood sugar levels; an investigation into their deaths reveals an overnight nurse was injecting patients with lethal doses of insulin.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A 70-year-old retired veteran is found dead on his boat after a bad sea storm; detectives discover he was killed during an attempted robbery after winning $400 in keno.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: The murder of teacher's aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community; as rumors spread about suspects, the actual perpetrator slips further away.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the letters F-E-D on his chest; with barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A single mom vanishes without a trace; foul play is confirmed after a truck toolbox opens with her body inside; homicide detectives investigate men she matched on dating sites, men from work, and a lover with a violent past.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A 20-year-old woman sets out on her bike and never returns; her body is found a few miles from her house with a gunshot wound to the head; years go by without any evidence or leads, until new investigators and technology breaks the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant is murdered while deployed out to sea; arsenic poisoning is the cause of death; investigators discover he had more than his fair share of enemies, but it takes years before investigators discover what really happened to him.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A building manager finds the lifeless body of a young woman in the bathtub; when questioned, an ex-con living downstairs lies to police; the lies do not prove murder and the case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A murder victim's final moments are caught on tape; the crime scene looks like a clear robbery-murder; text evidence at first points to a jilted lover, but police identify a second suspect with a motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A wounded woman calls 911; her husband, who wants a divorce, gets a hard look from police, but he has an airtight alibi during the murder; forensic science of ballistics draws a direct connection.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A religious woman is shot execution style in the suburbs of Michigan; surveillance video reveals it was a trio of killers; eventually, detectives get a break: a handwritten note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire investigator determines if a kerosene heater is the cause of a fire that killed one person or if it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Investigators piece together tiny clues at the scene of a hit-and-run accident; their findings help to track down the offending driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators determine what caused a house fire that killed an elderly couple and whether the victims' son is responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives are suspicious after a woman is killed in a hunting accident, but it takes more than twenty years before a trace evidence analyst is able to match fibers on a soiled blanket to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters find a skull in a Texas canyon, police find bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, some small bones and a strand of hair; once they discover her identity, it was time to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Suicide notes and a pistol in hand lead police to suspect that a mother of two young children appeared to have killed herself, but when investigators learned of a house fire she was in three years earlier, they reinvestigated.

programme.desc: Pieces of plastic the size of sand hold clues to a bombing.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding; her body is found a month later, three miles from her home; the killer unknowingly leaves a trace of evidence behind, tiny but unmistakable clues that pointed to him and him alone.

programme.desc: Investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception after a woman claims her husband was gunned down by intruders.

programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders; the killer had been careful, he uses poison which had no taste or odour, fortunately for investigators, it also has a unique chemical signature.

programme.desc: A man is murdered in his sleep but no fingerprints are anywhere to be found; a shoe impression outside could lead to the killer.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: An exploration of the top 10 mysterious sites on the planet that could prove alien visitation; from the age of the dinosaurs and ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In 1980, three young military men are sent into a UK forest to investigate strange lights, and they reportedly find a spacecraft, then they are ordered to never speak of the incident again; UFO encounters kept under wraps and what they reveal.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Exploring why ancient civilizations believed mountains were the homes of gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: According to legend, a curse was placed on the tomb of King Tutankhamun; researchers theorize that the curse came about as the result of alien technology with the purpose of protecting the truth about an otherworldly event as well as an alien device.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient site of Gobekli Tepe challenges what archaeologists believe about the past; the megalithic stone complex was built over 12,000 years ago, 5,000 years before the first known civilization was said to have emerged in Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Since 2017, the Navy has been releasing photos and videos of unidentified aerial phenomena, and ancient astronaut theorists suggest the images are nearly identical to accounts from centuries ago.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Aliens from the tiny star Sirius B may have visited humans in the distant past, imparting the knowledge of civilization to peoples thousands of miles apart.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From stone-throwing jungle apes, to swarms of sinister clowns stalking the suburbs, to skies raining down murderous birds, these are the strange encounters that leave the experts scratching their heads.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Monkey glands for immortality, hypnotized assassins and a brain-linked cyborg couple; investigating some of the strangest experiments on record.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Looking at outlandish inventions; a full-body gas mask for babies; Smell-o-Vision; a robot powered by eating slugs; inflatable airplanes; hidden cameras in contact lenses; coffin security systems.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: History is full of people pushing the limits, but some are more astonishing than others; like the man who single-handedly liberated a town during World War II; or an epic robbery in Buenos Aires that was pulled off with zero casualties.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: How did a pet pig spring into action to save its owner's life? Which mysterious spirits became the unlikely heroes that turned the tide for a doomed flight? And what shocking move did a carjacker make to rescue a baby trapped in a scorching car? These are the wild, unexpected stories of heroes you'd never see coming.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Uncover the wild beginnings behind ordinary objects, legendary figures, and even the sayings we use every day. Why did Abraham Lincoln once step into the wrestling ring? How do million-dollar birds procreate? What's the story behind a dog that ignited an international conflict? These are the strangest origin tales you've never heard-and won't believe!

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Chattanooga UFO, Ark of the Covenant, and Vanishing Time Mystery
programme.desc: Did a backyard stargazer capture video of UFOs over Chattanooga, Tennessee? Has the biblical Ark of the Covenant been discovered in a cave? Could a cathedral in Germany be the key to 300 years of history vanishing? And what's behind the mysterious phenomenon known as earthquake lights? Tony Harris and his team of experts analyze the video evidence to find the truth.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: A drilling accident tears open the Earth and unleashes a fire pit known as the "Gates of Hell"; a routine flight turns harrowing when the pilot gets sucked out of the cockpit midair; a ship mishap sinks 4,000 luxury cars into the Atlantic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick heads to Boston to check out an iconic warship; a Paul McCartney-signed guitar; a curious corkscrew collection; Rick gets a lead on an Apple 1, and he has to decide if he wants a byte.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: They check out some vintage horse equipment; a rare Pee-wee Herman scooter; a seller comes in looking for an offer on his signed poster from the TV show, "Bonanza;" a first edition of the classic book To Kill a Mockingbird flies in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey and Chum visit a classic car showroom to see a series 1 Shelby; a seller arrives with a classic Nintendo video game; Chum gets his hands on an autographed Olympic snowboard; a military vet brings in a pair of World War II binoculars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When a seller speeds into the shop with an iconic piece of Sammy Hagar memorabilia, Corey calls for backup; Rick has a chance to buy a vintage whiskey strap.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot from the movie "Grease"; Chum takes a whack at a Punch-A-Bag game once played by Jack Dempsey.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, an underestimated confectioner creates the first wrapped penny candy, the Tootsie Roll; an unemployed salesman transforms medicinal hard candy into a fruit flavored, multipack designed purely for fun with Tropical Charms.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake-mix; America's sweetheart and the original foodie go head-to-head.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Jim Folger discovers a new way to bring coffee to the masses; then another famous coffee brand gets its big break at the Maxwell House Hotel in Nashville; the creation of then coffee machines that help make coffee a billion-dollar industry.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Stephen Whitman introduces Americans to chocolate candy in a sampler box; Russell Stover builds a competing company; both brands help turn chocolate from an unknown import to a boxed American staple, given as a gift of love to this day.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Early American malls had no food court, until a cinnamon bun, a pretzel, and a panda all move in to create three of the world's most iconic food brands and transform the American Mall.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: In the wake of the Civil War, a revolution takes place on the backs of visionary entrepreneurs of industry like Heinz, Kellogg and Post; they push the limits of ingenuity to launch businesses that will revolutionize industry.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: A new breed of innovator rises up to expand American industry and push the limits of new technology; a father-and-son duo named Mars start on a path to challenge the chocolate throne.

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: WWII sees competing industrial empires joining the war effort in a united front to fuel the forces fighting for freedom abroad; in Post-War America, visionaries revolutionize the industry, and pave the way for the golden age of the American dream.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: The victorious Super 16 return to the arena, and Guy Fieri kicks off the second round of competition with four matchups; turning up the difficulty of the randomizer in this round.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer tasks the bakers with creating a visually stunning chocolate sculptural piece along with a complementary baked element; chocolatier Amaury Guichon joins Duff Goldman to judge the chefs' technical precision and creative storytelling.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the chefs to craft a large-format dessert with a decorative sugar element that embodies their assigned element, earth, air, fire, water, or space; Duff Goldman and Jacques Torres judge the striking sugar showpieces.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy has the chefs turn the ingredients from an old-fashioned Waldorf salad into a modern meal; to help the rising chefs reach the pinnacle of success, the towering Food Pyramid determines the details of its best international dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Four carnival food-loving chefs play carnival classics; Guy turns a popular strength test game into a finesse challenge; a simple game of ring toss determines the main protein for the chefs' best dish on a stick.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Chefs cook their best regional sandwich, but on a budget; creating seafood dishes using ingredients from around the market; Guy's food wheel decides where the remaining two chefs get to shop for their regional comfort food dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy gives four chefs a list of sale items they have to use over the course of the competition, with all of the required ingredients while making a high-end dinner in the first round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: The chefs battle with their budgets to make their best burger and side and race the clock to make an Asian takeout staple; the final challenge is a Mexican takeout-style dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri returns to some of his favorite diners; an old-school Atlanta spot is serving Southern comfort with mighty mac 'n cheese, a San Antonio staple is dishing out brisket hash; an eatery in Scottsdale is plating a supreme breakfast burrito.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas; in L.A.'s Chinatown, Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese; in Charlotte, N.C., calzones and a stuffed cabbage specialty.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's flying with chicken and so much more; in Santa Barbara, Calif., a butcher is saucing up chicken tacos; in Delray Beach, Fla., an homage to Mom includes a mouthwatering pasta; in Las Vegas, a chef is going over the top with Thai creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into chicken, noodles and more; an Omaha joint is going big with pasta and cheese, a champion chef in Los Angeles is prepping for a Nashville-Chinese mashup and an Italian spot in Greenwich, Conn., is putting out elevated dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's getting into mega Mexican, mac 'n' cheese and prime-time pie; there's lights-out Latin in Chicago putting an upscale spin on shrimp empanadas and the-bomb birria grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip; in Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Waffles in Anchorage, Alaska, and steak tacos in Aspen, Colo.; in Albuquerque, N.M., a Latin place makes repas and pork paninis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up a taco joint going above and beyond with their Ahogada Torta and a quesadilla-taco-au jus mashup; a Thai spot is piling up the pork and dynamite dumplings; a funky food truck is loading up monster sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Garland, a century-old staple serving up tasty sandwiches and a sweet treat; in Oklahoma City, a local landmark is dishing out Southern specialties, and in Denver, a spot putting a healthy spin on classic comfort foods.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Carnival Eats

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: At the Meriden Daffodil Festival in Connecticut, Noah Cappe samples Italian American family recipes turned carnival fair; he takes in the seafood scene at the Washington State Spring Fair and some rocky road-ified fries at the Four States Fair.

programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a special presentation of the 1776-2026 Enduring Liberty Half Dollars-one-year-only U.S. Mint issues honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including rare rolls and certified MS67 collectibles.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly celebrates her healthy baby with foods she couldn't eat while pregnant, including honey bagels with blueberry lox, a big salami railroad sandwich, beans and greens with runny eggs, and frozen strawberries and cream cocktails.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh prepares Canadian treats, including a ham and pineapple pizza, maple walnut Nanaimo bars and a bloody caesar salad; for a Canadian border mash-up, Molly makes a hot tot short rib poutine.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh prepares Canadian treats, including a ham and pineapple pizza, maple walnut Nanaimo bars and a bloody caesar salad; for a Canadian border mash-up, Molly makes a hot tot short rib poutine.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh cooks Korean-inspired foods; she makes sweet and spicy gochujang meatloaf sandwiches, cheesy Korean corn dogs and spicy blizzard fries; she finishes up with tangy orange bars with sesame crust.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes her favorite Middle Eastern dishes with a Midwestern touch; she prepares squash falafel with chipotle ranch, meaty twice baked potatoes, her take on a nutty basbousa with cherry compote and date cream soda floats to sip on the side.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh throws a fancy dinner with the best moms she knows; it's a meal to impress with her tender Beef Wellington served with a cheesy sausage and wild rice hotdish; for dessert, a lovely lavender panna cotta with salty pretzel shortbread.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh whips up fast-food faves for a test drive in the new family van; she hits the road with Smoked Turkey and Brie Horseshoe Sandwiches, Air Fryer Chicken Nuggets with Creamy Marinara Sauce, Gooey Butter Cake and Pistachio Milkshakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond spotlights different kinds of potatoes in a variety of delicious dishes; purple sweet potato soup with a pistachio crumble, corned beef hash with roasted russets and sweet potatoes, and potato dumplings with leftover mashed potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her sister Betsy bring a taste of Seattle to the prairie; they whip up a clam dip and Betsy's potato chips, crispy savory pancakes and a baked fontina cheese board, all washed down with a strawberry spritz.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Store-bought sauces take center stage as Ree Drummond makes pesto egg pockets and grilled chimichurri shrimp wraps; cheese sauce takes cheesesteak burgers to the next level, and enchilada sauce is a wonderful shortcut in a Tex-Mex skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking on the countertop; she puts together a speedy all-in-one sausage and potato soup in the pressure cooker; then, the air fryer is perfect for a fast BBQ chicken bagel pizza; the microwave serves up a quick brownie bowl.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving dishes that are a little controversial! Jeff Mauro makes a Hot Dog Grilled Cheese Sandwich, and Katie Lee Biegel takes on a hot-topic food in two ways with Strawberry Cottage Cheese Ice Cream and a Turkey Club Cottage Cheese Wrap.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Ina Garten invites journalist Frank Bruni to the barn, where he shares his life story and a boulevardier cocktail to be served alongside Ina's Parmesan thyme crackers; Ina treats Frank to a Gruyère and herb omelet lesson.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight

programme.title: Bang Bang
programme.desc: Following Bang Bang Rozyski, an eccentric retired pugilist obsessed with rectifying the sins of his past.

programme.title: Kevin Garnett: Anything Is Possible
programme.desc: Chronicling the career of one of the NBA's all-time greats, featuring scenes from Garnett's induction into the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.

programme.title: The Longshots
programme.desc: Curtis Plummer (Ice Cube), a down-on-his-luck former football player, becomes the new coach of the Minden, Illinois, Pop Warner football team. With his niece Jasmine (Keke Palmer) installed as the team's quarterback and secret weapon, Curtis has a chance to turn his life around, while the residents of Minden have a chance to recapture their team spirit and civic pride.

programme.title: The Wood
programme.desc: Three old friends -- Mike (Omar Epps), Roland (Taye Diggs) and Slim (Richard T. Jones) -- recount memories of their shared childhood in Inglewood, Calif., as they prepare for Roland's wedding to his fiancée, Lisa (LisaRaye). When the groom goes missing without a word, Mike and Slim struggle to find their nervous friend and return him to his impatient bride before the wedding begins. Along the way, they continue to swap stories about lessons learned during their awkward teenage years.

programme.title: Attica
programme.desc: During the summer of 1971, tensions between inmates and guards at the Attica Correctional Facility are at an all-time high. On the morning of Sept. 9, it all comes to a head as Attica becomes the stage for one of the largest U.S. prison riots ever.

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: Troy Maxson makes his living as a sanitation worker in the 1950s Pittsburgh. Maxson once dreamed of becoming a professional baseball player, but was deemed too old when the major leagues began admitting black athletes. Bitter over his missed opportunity, Troy creates further tension in his family when he squashes his son's chance to meet a college football recruiter.

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Two years before the Civil War, Django (Jamie Foxx), a slave, finds himself accompanying an unorthodox German bounty hunter named Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) on a mission to capture the vicious Brittle brothers. Their mission successful, Schultz frees Django, and together they hunt the South's most-wanted criminals. Their travels take them to the infamous plantation of shady Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio), where Django's long-lost wife (Kerry Washington) is still a slave.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Crooked cops on the take -- small-time drug lords -- sleazy informers and sadistic rich kids ready to kill --- for police detective John Shaft, its just another night in the underbelly of New York City, another shift facing down cops and criminals who want him dead and a legal system that thrives on money, not justice.

programme.title: Top Five
programme.desc: Though he began in stand-up comedy, Andre Allen (Chris Rock) hit the big-time as the star of a trilogy of action-comedies about a talking bear. Andre is forced to spend the day with Chelsea (Rosario Dawson) a profile writer for the New York Times, whose film critic has just panned Andre's passion project about the Haitian Revolution. Unexpectedly, Andre opens up to Chelsea, and as they wind their way across New York, Andre tries to get back in touch with his comedic roots.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Michael and Madison Roland planned to spend the rest of their lives together, but Michael's controlling ways turn their perfect marriage into an abusive roller-coaster ride that no woman could survive. With the help of her best friend, Madison decides to get away. After adopting a new identity, she meets Alex Stone and learns to love again. All seems well until Michael discovers Madison's whereabouts and re-creates her nightmare.

programme.title: The Ghost and the Darkness
programme.desc: Sir Robert Beaumont (Tom Wilkinson) is behind schedule on a railroad in Africa. Enlisting noted engineer John Henry Patterson (Val Kilmer) to right the ship, Beaumont expects results. Everything seems great until the crew discovers the mutilated corpse of the project's foreman (Henry Cele), seemingly killed by a lion. After several more attacks, Patterson calls in famed hunter Charles Remington (Michael Douglas), who has finally met his match in the bloodthirsty lions.

programme.title: Parallel
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: The Killing of Kenneth Chamberlain
programme.desc: The events that led to the death of Kenneth Chamberlain Sr., an elderly African American veteran with bipolar disorder, who was killed during a conflict with police officers who were dispatched to check on him.

programme.title: The Killing of Kenneth Chamberlain
programme.desc: The events that led to the death of Kenneth Chamberlain Sr., an elderly African American veteran with bipolar disorder, who was killed during a conflict with police officers who were dispatched to check on him.

programme.title: B******': The Sound and Fury of Rick James
programme.desc: A raw and intimate documentary look at the wildly colorful life of legendary funk artist Rick James; original interviews with artists, collaborators and friends.

programme.title: 16 Shots
programme.desc: A Chicago police officer is charged with murder after the shooting of Laquan McDonald.

programme.title: The Violent Heart
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets threaten to tear a couple apart.

programme.title: Good Burger
programme.desc: Teen misfits (Kel Mitchell, Kenan Thompson) at a modest burger joint face competition from a hamburger emporium across the street.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: 48 HRS.
programme.desc: Renegade cop Jack Cates (Nick Nolte) pulls bank robber Reggie Hammond (Eddie Murphy) from a federal prison on a 48-hour leave to help him capture Hammond's old partner, Albert Ganz (James Remar). Having escaped from a prison work crew, Ganz is on a killing spree around San Francisco, on the trail of half a million dollars that went missing after one of his robberies. The cocky Reggie knows where the money is, but spars with the hotheaded Jack as he enjoys his temporary freedom.

programme.title: Another 48 Hrs.
programme.desc: Jack Cates once again enlists the aid of ex-con Reggie Hammond. This time it is to take down The Iceman, a ruthless drug lord operating in the San Francisco Bay Area.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: As rioting rocks Los Angeles in the year 2028, disgruntled thieves make their way to Hotel Artemis -- a 13-story, members-only hospital for criminals. It's operated by the Nurse, a no-nonsense, high-tech healer who already has her hands full of a French assassin, an arms dealer and an injured cop. As the violence of the night continues, the Nurse must decide whether to break her own rules and confront what she's worked so hard to avoid.

programme.title: Black Snake Moan
programme.desc: After her lover (Justin Timberlake) leaves to serve in the military, Rae (Christina Ricci) gives in to her raging libido and leaps into a life of wild abandon. Lazarus (Samuel L. Jackson), a troubled bluesman, finds Rae beaten and left for dead. He takes her in and holds her captive in an attempt to help her find a cure for her affliction.

programme.title: B******': The Sound and Fury of Rick James
programme.desc: A raw and intimate documentary look at the wildly colorful life of legendary funk artist Rick James; original interviews with artists, collaborators and friends.

programme.title: Kokomo City
programme.desc: Four Black transgender sex workers tell their life stories in intimate and candid interviews.

programme.title: Ricky Powell: The Individualist
programme.desc: Photographer Ricky Powell captures the music, fashion and art scene in New York City in the 1980s and '90s.

programme.title: NYC Point Gods
programme.desc: Point guards including Rafer Alston, Kenny Anderson, Mark Jackson, Stephon Marbury, Kenny Smith and Rod Strickland hone their craft and taste for showmanship on New York City's iconic playgrounds and in high school gyms in the 1980s and '90s.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: The year is 2018 in a futuristic society where corporations have replaced countries. A violent futuristic game known as Rollerball is the recreational sport of the world, with teams representing various areas. One player, Jonathan E., fights for his personal freedom and threatens the corporate control.

programme.title: Unseen
programme.desc: Sam, a gas station clerk, receives a random call from Emily, a nearly blind woman who's running from her murderous ex in the woods. Using a phone, Sam becomes Emily's only chance for survival as she guides the terrified woman through a video call.

programme.title: Wicker Park
programme.desc: Matthew (Josh Hartnett) and Lisa (Diane Kruger) are madly in love. But one day Lisa vanishes. Simon enters an emotional tailspin and begins an obsessive quest to find her. Years later, Simon's life has stabilized, and he's in a new relationship. Then he thinks he sees Lisa in a restaurant and fixates on her all over again. He snoops around and eventually tracks down the mysterious woman from the restaurant. Her name is Alex (Rose Byrne), but she acts just like Lisa.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles Police Department in 1992, "Dark Blue" is a thriller that takes place just days before the acquittal of four white officers in the beating of black motorist Rodney King and the subsequent L.A. riots. In this racially charged climate, the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad is assigned a quadruple homicide. As they work the case, detective Eldon (Kurt Russell), tutors SIS rookie Bobby (Scott Speedman) in the realities of police intimidation and corruption.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: Having just been released from jail, Bumpy Johnson (Laurence Fishburne) returns to his criminal ways as a linchpin in the African-American-run numbers racket. However, Bumpy's longtime friend Illinois Gordon (Chi McBride) and girlfriend Francine Hughes (Vanessa Williams) are both eager to get him back on the straight and narrow. But a brewing rivalry with Mafia boss Lucky Luciano (Andy Garcia) and his henchman Dutch Schultz (Tim Roth) threatens to raise the stakes to dangerous new levels.

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: After staging a particularly gory jailbreak, Irish Republican Army agent Ryan Gaerity (Tommy Lee Jones) makes his way to Boston and begins systematically picking off members of the police bomb squad. The leader of this team, Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges), is set to retire, but the recent spate of bombings leads him to stay on in an attempt to save as many of his men as possible. It isn't long before he discovers the culprit is his old colleague Gaerity, seeking revenge from their shared past.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: The Double Deuce is the meanest, loudest and rowdiest bar south of the Mason-Dixon Line, and Dalton (Patrick Swayze) has been hired to clean it up. He might not look like much, but the Ph.D.-educated bouncer proves he's more than capable -- busting the heads of troublemakers and turning the roadhouse into a jumping hot-spot. But Dalton's romance with the gorgeous Dr. Clay (Kelly Lynch) puts him on the bad side of cutthroat local big shot Brad Wesley (Ben Gazzara).

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Silver miner Daniel Plainview (Daniel Day-Lewis) leads a hardscrabble life with his son, H.W. (Dillon Freasier). When he hears about oil oozing from the ground near the Western town of Little Boston, Daniel takes his son on a mission to find their fortune. Daniel makes his lucky strike and becomes a self-made tycoon but, as his fortune grows, he deviates into moral bankruptcy.

programme.title: A Working Man
programme.desc: Levon Cade left behind a decorated military career in the black ops to live a simple life of working construction. However, when human traffickers kidnap his boss's daughter, his search to bring her home uncovers a world of corruption far greater than he ever could have imagined.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: A cab driver realizes his current fare is a hit man that has been having him drive around from mark to mark until the last witness to a crime is dead. When the cabbie finally figures out the truth, he must prevent the assassin from wiping out his last witness without becoming the next in the professional killer's line of casualties.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: Saint Maud
programme.desc: Maud, an unstable, newly devout hospice nurse, becomes obsessed with saving her dying patient's soul -- but sinister forces and her own sinful past threaten her holy calling.

programme.title: Unprotected Sets
programme.desc: After her dreams of becoming a WNBA player are cut short by a tragic accident, Zainab Johnson finds her way to the stage, where her smart and edgy storytelling is informed by her experiences growing up in Harlem in an African-American Muslim family.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Insurance worker C.C. Baxter (Jack Lemmon) lends his Upper West Side apartment to company bosses to use for extramarital affairs. When his manager Mr. Sheldrake (Fred MacMurray) begins using Baxter's apartment in exchange for promoting him, Baxter is disappointed to learn that Sheldrake's mistress is Fran Kubelik (Shirley MacLaine), the elevator girl at work whom Baxter is interested in himself. Soon Baxter must decide between the girl he loves and the advancement of his career.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Insurance worker C.C. Baxter (Jack Lemmon) lends his Upper West Side apartment to company bosses to use for extramarital affairs. When his manager Mr. Sheldrake (Fred MacMurray) begins using Baxter's apartment in exchange for promoting him, Baxter is disappointed to learn that Sheldrake's mistress is Fran Kubelik (Shirley MacLaine), the elevator girl at work whom Baxter is interested in himself. Soon Baxter must decide between the girl he loves and the advancement of his career.

programme.title: Weekend in Taipei
programme.desc: A former DEA agent and an ex-undercover operative rekindle their romance during a weekend in Taipei. As they reconnect, they're oblivious to the looming dangers stemming from their past operations.

programme.title: Virtuosity
programme.desc: A former cop who has been imprisoned for murdering the psychopath who killed his family, Parker Barnes (Denzel Washington) is recruited to test out a new virtual-reality program where the goal is to apprehend a computer-generated being called SID 6.7 (Russell Crowe), who has been modeled on hundreds of deranged criminals. When SID manages to escape into the real world, Barnes must capture or destroy him before the soulless entity can go on a killing spree.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: When U.S. government operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and his mentor, Jim Phelps (Jon Voight), go on a covert assignment that takes a disastrous turn, Jim is killed, and Ethan becomes the prime murder suspect. Now a fugitive, Hunt recruits brilliant hacker Luther Stickell (Ving Rhames) and maverick pilot Franz Krieger (Jean Reno) to help him sneak into a heavily guarded CIA building to retrieve a confidential computer file that will prove his innocence.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Tom Cruise returns to his role as Ethan Hunt in the second installment of "Mission: Impossible." This time Ethan Hunt leads his IMF team on a mission to capture a deadly German virus before it is released by terrorists. His mission is made impossible due to the fact that he is not the only person after samples of the disease. He must also contest with a gang of international terrorists headed by a turned bad former IMF agent who has already managed to steal the cure.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Retired from active duty, and training recruits for the Impossible Mission Force, agent Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) faces the toughest foe of his career: Owen Davian (Philip Seymour Hoffman), an international broker of arms and information, who is as cunning as he is ruthless. Davian emerges to threaten Hunt and all that he holds dear -- including the woman Hunt loves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for a terrorist attack on the Kremlin, Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and the entire IMF agency are disavowed by the U.S. government, while the president initiates the Ghost Protocol. Forced to go "off the grid" -- left without resources or backup -- Hunt must somehow clear the agency's name and prevent another attack. Complicating matters even more, Ethan must undertake the impossible mission with a group of fellow IMF fugitives whose actual motives are suspect.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF now disbanded and Ethan Hunt out in the cold, a new threat -- called the Syndicate -- soon emerges. The Syndicate is a network of highly skilled operatives who are dedicated to establishing a new world order via an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Faced with what may be the most impossible mission yet, Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with Ilsa Faust, a disavowed British agent who may or may not be a member of this deadly rogue nation.

programme.title: Wildcat
programme.desc: An ex-black ops team reunites to pull off a desperate heist and save an eight-year-old girl's life.

programme.title: Here After
programme.desc: Claire is overjoyed when her daughter, Robin, is miraculously revived after a fatal accident. However, her relief soon turns to dread as she starts to suspect that something dark has followed Robin back from the brink of death.

programme.title: Nickel Boys
programme.desc: Elwood Curtis' college dreams are shattered when he's sentenced to Nickel Academy, a brutal reformatory in the Jim Crow South. Clinging to his optimistic worldview, Elwood strikes up a friendship with Turner, a fellow Black teen who dispenses fundamental tips for survival.

programme.title: LaRoy, Texas
programme.desc: A depressed man plans to kill himself, but his plans suddenly change when a stranger mistakes him for a low-rent hit man. Desperate to earn a little respect, he decides to play the part of a hired gun. However, when the supposedly simple plan begins to unravel, he recruits a private investigator to help him escape from the actual killer and make it out alive.

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom Protecting the Wild
programme.desc: In Queensland, Australia, Peter and Dr. Rae join volunteers providing critical animal protection for rescued koalas and witness the rehabilitation of rare tree kangaroos; at a zoo in Texas, Dr. Rae provides care to rescued baby spider monkeys.

programme.title: Earth Odyssey With Dylan Dreyer
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer treks into the mountains where red deer roar to find a new mate, furry marmots stand guard against predators in the sky and an ancient fish species builds a nest.

programme.title: Wild Child
programme.desc: Sheinelle Jones heads down under to meet cute koalas, kickboxing kangaroos and adorable sea lions getting ready to take their first plunge.

programme.title: Forever Young With Dr. Pablo Prichard
programme.desc: From cutting-edge biomarker insights to proven principles that support vitality, Danielle and Dr. Pablo, along with special guest Dugal Bain-Kim, reveal how modern technology and daily habits can create a clearer path toward living longer.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
2026 The Chevron Championship
programme.desc: Round 3 of the 2026 LPGA's Championship takes place at Houston's Memorial Park Golf Course. The 2026 purse is $9 million. Saigo Mao, the reigning 2025 champion, aims to defend her title after winning in a record-setting five-way playoff last year.

programme.title: NBA Basketball
programme.sub-title: Oklahoma City Thunder at Phoenix Suns
programme.desc: The Thunder tip off against the Suns for Game 3 of the West first round. Oklahoma City leads the series 2-0 after a Game 2 win. Fresh off being named NBA Clutch Player of the Year Shai Gilgeous-Alexander led all scorers with 37 points and 9 assists.

programme.title: NBA Basketball
programme.sub-title: New York Knicks at Atlanta Hawks
programme.desc: The Knicks take on the Hawks at State Farm Arena for Game 4 of the East first round. Atlanta leads 2-1 after a narrow Game 3 win. OG Anunoby scored 29 points. CJ McCollum hit a 15-foot clutch fadeaway with 12.5 seconds left to secure the Hawks' win.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Tammy, a high school administrator, and husband Doug, an Army veteran, from Newport News, Va., love to help their community; Tammy raises funds every year for her students' prom, and now she and Doug try to dance their way to millions.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police respond to a report of a break-in, they discover a woman was murdered, launching an investigation with a false confession and a dangerous romance.

programme.title: Saturday Night Live
programme.desc: Host Ariana Grande; Cher performs.

programme.title: 1st Look
programme.desc: A look back at all of Ashley's firsts, including playing dress-up, getting physical, conquering fears and mastering love.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: A Frank Lloyd Wright masterpiece in Detroit; the iconic townhome featured in "Breakfast at Tiffany's."

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: A bespoke Soho loft; an architectural beauty in Malibu.

programme.title: Access Hollywood

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
Moonlight
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: The Smashing Machine
programme.desc: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiancé (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiancé (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Architecton
programme.desc: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

programme.title: Enigma
programme.desc: An exploration of transgender identity and legacy through the stories of icons April Ashley and Amanda Lear.

programme.title: Night Is Not Eternal
programme.desc: A personal exploration of political activism; following Rosa Maria Paya, a young Cuban activist and daughter of five-time Nobel Peace Prize nominee Oswaldo Paya, in her fight for democratic change in Cuba.

programme.title: Date Night
programme.desc: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: Breakfast With Shorts
programme.desc: Shorts to start the day, including family drama "The Shine In Your Eyes"; an inventor and his 11-year-old test pilot try their best in Oscar-shortlisted drama "Icarus"; life-improvement comedy "Refrigerate After Opening."

programme.title: Breakfast With Shorts
programme.desc: "Letter to You"; a town puts on its own soccer tournament in "The World Cup in a Square"; Bella Ramsey stars in historical drama "On the Beaches" set in 1933.

programme.title: Breakfast With Shorts
programme.desc: Great shorts to start your day, with action comedy 'Wedlock'; warm-hearted story 'Waiting Room' with Julian Glover; strong emotions are awakened in love drama 'Marilyn Lights'; and Sherlock Holmes-related period story 'The Final Problem'.

programme.desc: Insightful docs, including 'Working Homeless' where reality and the American Dream clash; a filmmaker learns about her family history in the Holocaust themed 'Where The Tracks Lead'; and dogs get rescued in 'Some Dogs Go To Heaven'.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Depicting a mother facing the pressures of aging; "Hamdardi" follows an immigration officer torn between the law and his conscience; and "The More We Get Together" focuses on concerns for an ill father.

programme.desc: Romantic comedies, including online daters meeting in the wacky 'Tinder Mercies'; a student has a crush on her teacher in 'Auntie Issues'; there is a strange shortage of dog leashes in 'Doggy Style'; and a married couple heads to 'Therapy'.

programme.title: Refugee Stories
programme.desc: Dramas about refugees, including "Aamir" about a 13-year-old boy in a refugee camp; a doctor tries to escape Syria with her daughter in the Oscar-shortlisted "Refugee"; a visitor brings family news in "Recurrence."
